title: Size Rayguns
description: Adds a Shrink Raygun and a Growth Raygun
body:
# 🟦 **SIZE RAYGUNS** 🟥
⚠ **VERSIONS BELOW 1.21 REQUIRE [PEHKUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui)**

🔫 Adds 2 Rayguns (Shrink Raygun and Growth Raygun)

🔽 Allow you to scale up/down mobs and yourself 🔼

🖱 Right-clicking will shoot the raygun and scales up/down anything it hits

🖱 Shift right-clicking will scale **you** up/down

(Your reach changes depending on your size)

## 🛠 Crafting
![Rayguns Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/9nziDhD.gif)

## 🔧 Reparing
